name: brewline-coffee
corpus:
Owner profile: My name is John Avery. I founded Brewline Coffee in 2019, and we are based in Portland, Oregon. I started the company after roasting beans in my garage for years.

Returns and refunds: We accept returns of unopened coffee within 30 days of purchase with a receipt for a full refund. Opened bags can be exchanged if there is a quality issue.

Store hours: We are open Monday to Friday from 7 am to 6 pm. On weekends we are open Saturday and Sunday from 8 am to 4 pm.

Flagship product: Our most popular coffee is a dark roast called Midnight Harbor. It is rich, smoky, and our best seller every year.

Shipping: We offer free shipping on all orders over $40. Standard delivery takes 2 to 4 business days within the United States.

Support contact: You can reach our support team at support@brewline.coffee or by phone at 503-555-0142 during store hours.

Loyalty program: Our rewards program is called Brewline Beans. After you buy nine bags, your tenth bag is free.
